text: Stepping through the glass doors, I enter a brightly lit, modern space. The air feels clean and promising, as if knowledge and creativity can be drawn from it. The bold, colorful displays stimulate my mind, urging me to reflect on the relationship between research, technology, and human curiosity. I feel both small and expansive, aware that I'm one seeker amidst a vast landscape of collective endeavor. Here, I sense an invitation to ponder, to question, and to feel awe at the ingenuity surrounding me.
